title: CDOT Compass
summary: An intern-built career discovery platform created for the CDOT Innovation Challenge.
description: CDOT Compass is a front-end prototype built during a summer internship for the CDOT Innovation Challenge. It helps interns explore divisions, projects, mentors, resources, and career paths in one place — making existing opportunities easier to discover. It is a prototype, not an officially adopted CDOT system.
